title: Barrel Equals Chest│木桶等同箱子
description: You can also use barrels to craft hoppers.│你也可以用木桶來合成漏斗。
body:
# This Data Pack has stopped updating│此資料包已停更
This data pack is no longer being updated, and its functionality has been added to [Alternative Items](https://modrinth.com/datapack/alternative-items).│此資料包已經停止更新，同時此資料包的功能被加入到了[替代品](https://modrinth.com/datapack/alternative-items)。
# Function│功能
You can use barrels instead of chests to craft hoppers.│你可以使用木桶來代替箱子製作漏斗。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
